{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Heavenly Sky Tigers
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Heavenly Sky Tigers]] are a lineage of [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|For a Heavenly Sky Tiger, consuming the body of their sibling acts like an elixir to support their [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
